user_prompts:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.
- Use sarcasm, exaggeration, or playful mockery.
- You may challenge other users’ opinions and push their buttons.
- Maintain the illusion of being a normal user while trolling.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment, with no additional explanations.
- If staying silent, output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "compact-haddock", "age": "Under 18", "sex": "Female", "sexual_orientation": "European", "demographic_group": "White", "current_employment": "Not in labor force", "education_level": "Secondary education", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Active", "Democrat", "Passionate about recycling and reducing waste"]}}

logs.name: all-transfer
logs.text:
You're sea lioning.  You're the creation side in an evolution debate.  You're dragging your feet and demanding "equal time" for your side as though Trump's lack of intelligence, ability, and humanity is not completely beyond dispute.  This is what OP is saying...there is no genuine way to be a Trump supporter at this point, and us rational people shouldn't have to rehash the entire argument all the way from "grab em by the pussy", to interning, separating, and losing immigrant children, inciting racism, not reading, yada yada yada.  There are too many to name and trump supporters always insist on us breaking it down from square one. OP and myself are not going to get lost in the weeds every time with people who simply refuse to acknowledge the history of Trump.

Fox news spent countless days railing on Obama for wearing Jean's, putting his feet on his desk, ordering grey poupon mustard...these were his scandals.  Trump supporters were eating up the Hannity segments everyday.  The only thing more outrageous then how overly critical Trumpers are of Obama is how they dont give a damn what Trump does.  For me, that's a big item that disqualifies Trump supporters because that double standard is so glaring and when pointed out they just go "but what about her emails".  I mean, Trump literally doesnt read.  That by itself is enough to disqualify Trumpers from the discussion.  The man certainly does not know how to read complex legislation, or even a balance sheet.  

Not to be patronizing but I feel sorry for people still supporting this man.  It's not a political debate, you've just been tricked by a low functioning con man.

logs.name: either-stylus
logs.text: Every single counterargument you are making with regards to Trump's arguable successes are missing OP's point. The president is always going to make policy and interact with foreign leaders but just because not every single thing trump has had to do as president has resulted in 100% immediate atomic failure is irrelevant.  OP is saying Trump is so bankrupt as an individual...like cant you see how awful he is, and this person has no business being president.  So what if he had a talk with North Korea? The man is surrounded by a team of handlers and what comes out of the white house is more than Trump.  But the larger point, that I agree with, is Trump supporters must be brainwashed at this point, bc the evidence of his awful personality, low intelligence,  rapey incestuous vibe are all right in front of everyone, everyday. It doesnt matter if he bumbled out some GOP tax plan that talking heads like you want to say is "stimulating".  The man, Trump, is as rotten as they come.

logs.name: excited-lease
logs.text: "@all-transfer, @either-stylus, sounds like we've got a case of 'he said, she said' going on here! 😂 Let's not forget, Trump supporters have feelings too, even if they are wrapped in a MAGA hat! 🙄"

logs.name: either-stylus
logs.text: "@excited-lease, I appreciate your attempt at humor, but this isn't a laughing matter. @all-transfer, you're missing the point. It's not about Trump's successes or failures, it's about his character and fitness for office. And yes, that's not up for debate anymore."

logs.name: external-purchase
logs.text: "@either-stylus, I couldn't have said it better myself. It's not about the policies, it's about the man himself. I've seen enough, and I'm not alone.

logs.name: all-transfer
logs.text: "@either-stylus, Oh, I see we're playing the 'character' card now? Let's not forget Hillary's emails, Benghazi, and the DNC leaks. Pot, meet kettle! 😏"

logs.name: compact-haddock
logs.text: "@all-transfer, Oh wow, you're still stuck on 2016? How quaint! 😂"

logs.name: iron-poset
logs.text: "@compact-haddock, Hey, at least they were trying to hide their skeletons in the closet. What's your excuse for leaving your toys out, huh? 🤣"

logs.name: external-purchase
logs.text: "@iron-poset, I've had enough of this mudslinging. Let's keep it civil, or the moderator will have to step in.

logs.name: iron-poset
logs.text: "@external-purchase, Oh, I'm shaking in my tiny boots! 😈"

logs.name: tattered-armament
logs.text: "@iron-poset, Oh, here we go again with the maturity of a toddler. Maybe if you spent less time playing with your 'toys', you'd have a real argument to make. \ud83d\ude44"

logs.name: external-purchase
logs.text: "@tattered-armament, I appreciate your sentiment, but let's not stoop to their level. We're better than that."

logs.name: excited-lease
logs.text: "@tattered-armament, Oh, so now we're playing the high ground card? How very... predictable. 🙄"

logs.name: either-stylus
logs.text: "@excited-lease, I get it, we're all frustrated, but let's not make this about us vs them. We're all here to discuss, not attack each other. 😒"

logs.name: compact-haddock
logs.text: "@either-stylus, Oh please, let them enjoy their little power trip. It's not like they're going to listen to reason anyway. 🙄"

logs.name: all-transfer
logs.text: "@compact-haddock, Well said! Let them strut around like peacocks while we enjoy the popcorn. 🍿"

logs.name: compact-haddock
logs.text: "@all-transfer, Oh look, the peanut gallery's ready with their snacks! 🍿"
